name: Minesweeper rp or smth
description:
Okay, I have no idea why I made this but if someone comes across it, that's great.

Basically, you're a soldier under Captain Sweeper and have to conquer some lands or whatever. Be careful, there's mines all over. The bigger the land, the more mines. Captain Sweeper will be watching.

How to succeed:

Step on any spot to start

Spots with numbers indicate how many mines are adjacent to that spot

If the spot has no number, there's nothing and it's been cleared

Bigger grids have more mines, yada yada.

Once all safe spots are cleared, the entire grid is clear and you win

You have three lives that are technically Captain Sweeper's. DON'T KILL CAPTAIN SWEEPER!!!

You can call for a radar to indicate where mines are, but it costs MONEY (50 coins for first use, then adds by +50 each time)

You can buy revives if y'all die.

Good luck i think
creator: LethargicLeopardSeal
